title: Would like to reference cell from different pulse
excerpt: Currently i am using both Excel (via office 365) to collect data, and Monday.com.  My preference is firmly with Monday.com but because i cannot (? I think) build formulas into a board that will automatically reference a …

posts.author: sean_pienaar (Sean)
posts.cookedHtml: Currently i am using both Excel (via office 365) to collect data, and Monday.com. My preference is firmly with Monday.com but because i cannot (? I think) build formulas into a board that will automatically reference a cell from a different pulse - i need to use both platforms. Does anyone know of a way around this, or must i merely integrate/ mirror the data using something like Zapier?

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@sean_pienaar

Yes, something like Zapier is currently the only way.

However, I would recommend something like Make instead. Here’s why: What is Make & How can it help you with monday?

Jim - The Monday Man

posts.author: sean_pienaar (Sean)
posts.cookedHtml:
